candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to explicit total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow period-end cash.
Could be a cash line, but explicit 'Cash and cash equivalents' exists and is preferable.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow closing cash; less preferred than balance-sheet cash line for CHE.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash line as preferred CHE mapping.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Clean current borrowing line on the balance sheet and not lease-related.
Can represent current maturities of debt, but this label appears in both debt and capital lease supplemental sections, creating ambiguity.
Too broad and may include lease/current financing liabilities; not a clean STD line.

variables.notes: STD likely comprises short-term borrowings plus current maturities. Included 'Current Loans' and 'Maturing Within 1 Year', but manual review is needed because 'Maturing Within 1 Year' appears more than once and one occurrence relates to capital leases, which should be excluded.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.
Tax asset, not taxes payable.
Cash-flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is a confident exact balance-sheet tax payable equivalent.

candidates.why: Best available PPE-style reported line; under IFRS this commonly corresponds to property, plant and equipment net.
Gross PPE-type line would be preferred if populated, but preview shows no values and explicit total is unclear.
Lease-related asset and not baseline PPE target.

variables.notes: Selected 'Tangible assets' as the best PPE proxy, but the label occurs multiple times and one occurrence may be a component rather than total PPE. Manual review recommended to confirm the intended total/net PPE row.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Other LT Assets, Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Not total assets; balancing line for a subsection.
Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Net cash generated from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Also a pre-working-capital subtotal rather than final OANCF.

variables.notes: Chosen final net operating cash flow line, not the before-working-capital subtotal.
